Are you available for freelance projects: Are you available for freelance projects?
Yes! I'm actively open to freelance coll: Yes! I'm actively open to freelance collaborations — whether it's a full web app, landing page, or API integration. Feel free to reach out via the contact section below and we can discuss your needs.
What is your preferred tech stack?: What is your preferred tech stack?
My primary stack is Vue.js / Nuxt.js for: My primary stack is Vue.js / Nuxt.js for frontend and Node.js / Laravel for backend. For databases I work with Supabase, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. That said, I'm tech-agnostic — I adapt to whatever stack best fits the project.
Are you open to full-time employment?: Are you open to full-time employment?
Absolutely. I'm open to full-time positi: Absolutely. I'm open to full-time positions as a Fullstack or Frontend Developer. I value collaborative teams, clear communication, and meaningful products. Let's connect and see if we're a good fit!
How long does it typically take to build: How long does it typically take to build a project?
It depends on the scope. A landing page: It depends on the scope. A landing page can take 3–7 days, while a full-featured web app typically takes 2–6 weeks. I always provide a timeline estimate after understanding the project requirements.
What industries have you worked in?: What industries have you worked in?
I've worked in agritech (Jurutani), gene: I've worked in agritech (Jurutani), general software services (Sekeco), and delivered freelance projects across e-commerce, company profiles, dashboards, and educational platforms.
You can reach me through the 'Get in Tou: You can reach me through the 'Get in Touch' section at the bottom of this page, or connect with me on LinkedIn and GitHub. I usually respond within 1–2 business days.
From backend architecture to interface d: From backend architecture to interface design, each service is shaped to turn complex ideas into reliable digital products.
